subtasks.description: Generate SQL query to fetch AWS contracted commitment levels and actual spend by service, region, and time period. Returns commitment amount, actual spend, utilization rate, and variance metrics.

Reconcile contracted commitments against actual spend data to classify overcommitment vs underutilization posture by service. Generate recommendations for commitment optimization (increase commitments for underutilized services, reduce for overcommitted ones).

plan.cost_rationale: Two subtasks required: (1) sql_gen (mid tier) to join commitment registry with spend tables and calculate variance across multiple dimensions (service, region, time) — this is moderate complexity requiring multi-table joins and aggregation. (2) cross_recon (mid tier) to reconcile the two signal streams (contractual vs actual) and classify posture with actionable recommendations — this is cross-source reconciliation with business logic but does not require frontier-level inference. Kept to minimum: the spend analysis and posture classification naturally bundle into two sequential steps; no policy_action needed since this is utilization analysis, not governance approval.

output.sql: SELECT cf.product AS service, cf.publisher AS region, cf.fiscal_year, cf.fiscal_quarter, SUM(CASE WHEN cf.event_type = 'commitment' THEN cf.amount_usd ELSE 0 END) AS committed_amount_usd, SUM(CASE WHEN cf.event_type = 'usage' THEN cf.amount_usd ELSE 0 END) AS actual_spend_usd, CASE WHEN SUM(CASE WHEN cf.event_type = 'commitment' THEN cf.amount_usd ELSE 0 END) > 0 THEN ROUND( SUM(CASE WHEN cf.event_type = 'usage' THEN cf.amount_usd ELSE 0 END) / SUM(CASE WHEN cf.event_type = 'commitment' THEN cf.amount_usd ELSE 0 END) * 100, 2 ) ELSE NULL END AS utilization_rate_pct, SUM(CASE WHEN cf.event_type = 'usage' THEN cf.amount_usd ELSE 0 END) - SUM(CASE WHEN cf.event_type = 'commitment' THEN cf.amount_usd ELSE 0 END) AS variance_usd, CASE WHEN SUM(CASE WHEN cf.event_type = 'usage' THEN cf.amount_usd ELSE 0 END) > SUM(CASE WHEN cf.event_type = 'commitment' THEN cf.amount_usd ELSE 0 END) THEN 'OVERCOMMITMENT' WHEN SUM(CASE WHEN cf.event_type = 'usage' THEN cf.amount_usd ELSE 0 END) < SUM(CASE WHEN cf.event_type = 'commitment' THEN cf.amount_usd ELSE 0 END) THEN 'UNDERUTILIZATION' ELSE 'ON_TARGET' END AS commitment_status FROM consumption_facts cf WHERE cf.publisher = 'AWS' GROUP BY cf.product, cf.publisher, cf.fiscal_year, cf.fiscal_quarter ORDER BY cf.fiscal_year DESC, cf.fiscal_quarter DESC, variance_usd ASC
